channel.title: 2026-05-04 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-04 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Correlated Phase Error Bursts in a Gap-Engineered Superconducting Qubit Array
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Vladislav D. Kurilovich, Gabrielle Roberts, Leigh S. Martin, Matt McEwen, Alec Eickbusch, Lara Faoro, Lev B. Ioffe, Juan Atalaya, Alexander Bilmes, John Mark Kreikebaum, Andreas Bengtsson, Paul Klimov, Matthew Neeley, Wojciech Mruczkiewicz, Kevin Miao, Igor L. Aleiner, Julian Kelly, Yu Chen, Kevin Satzinger, and Alex Opremcak
Author(s): Vladislav D. Kurilovich, Gabrielle Roberts, Leigh S. Martin, Matt McEwen, Alec Eickbusch, Lara Faoro, Lev B. Ioffe, Juan Atalaya, Alexander Bilmes, John Mark Kreikebaum, Andreas Bengtsson, Paul Klimov, Matthew Neeley, Wojciech Mruczkiewicz, Kevin Miao, Igor L. Aleiner, Julian Kelly, Yu Chen, Kevin Satzinger, and Alex Opremcak Ionizing radiation is shown to induce a new type of correlated error in a superconducting quantum processor—phase error bursts—that undermines quantum error correction even with state-of-the-art radiation protection. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 021025] Published Mon May 04, 2026
